2604.06424.title: Team Fusion@ SU@ BC8 SympTEMIST track: transformer-based approach for symptom recognition and linking
2604.06424.paper_summary: This paper presents a transformer-based approach to solving the SympTEMIST named entity recognition (NER) and entity linking (EL) tasks. For NER, we fine-tune a RoBERTa-based (1) token-level classifier with BiLSTM and CRF layers on an augmented train set. Entity linking is performed by generating candidates using the cross-lingual SapBERT XLMR-Large (2), and calculating cosine similarity against a knowledge base. The choice of knowledge base proves to have the highest impact on model accuracy.
2604.06424.paper_summary_zh: 這篇論文提出了一種基於Transformer的解決方案，用於處理SympTEMIST命名實體識別（NER）和實體連結（EL）任務。<lb/>對於NER，我們在增強的訓練集上微調了一個基於RoBERTa的（1）標記級分類器，並使用BiLSTM和CRF層。<lb/>實體連結是通過使用跨語言SapBERT XLMR-Large（2）生成候選者，並計算與知識庫的餘弦相似度來進行的。<lb/>知識庫的選擇對模型準確性具有最大的影響。
2604.06424.author: Georgi Grazhdanski et.al.
2604.06424.authors: Georgi Grazhdanski, Sylvia Vassileva, Ivan Koychev, Svetla Boytcheva
